_comment: Template engine configuration. Copy to config.json (which is gitignored) and edit. NEVER put credentials or absolute/home paths here: the GCS backend uses ambient IAM credentials, Zenodo is public. The 'local.root' below is a placeholder relative path; point it at your own content-addressed store.

local._comment: A directory of content-addressed blobs: <root>/<algo-hex>/<filename>. './local-store' is a placeholder relative to the repo root.

gcs._comment: Private GCS bucket. Requires the [gcs] extra. Auth via Application Default Credentials or GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS (a read-only IAM service account).

zenodo._comment: Public Zenodo deposit. record_id pins one immutable, version-DOI'd record.
